.github/workflows/maven-publish.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 8 for the build environment.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/pom.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Framework version to a release compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.3.
Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.x to align with the Java 21 migration path.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation features.
Replace deprecated separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag for modern Java compilation.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with @AutoConfiguration for Spring Boot 3.3+ auto-configuration classes.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3 deprecates using @Configuration for auto-configuration classes in favor of @AutoConfiguration to improve startup performance and clarity; while not a hard compile error yet, it is a required migration step for the target framework version.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Update imports to use the new @AutoConfiguration annotation from org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.why_exists: The new @AutoConfiguration annotation resides in a different package than the old @Configuration annotation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Framework version to a release compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.3.
Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.x to align with the Java 21 migration path.
Remove the javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer required or compatible in the Jakarta EE / Java 21 ecosystem.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is part of the legacy Java EE stack; while not strictly a compile error if unused, it is removed to clean up dependencies for the Jakarta migration often associated with Spring Boot 3.x/Java 21 upgrades.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation features.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag for modern Java compilation.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in favor of the release flag in modern Java toolchains; while not a hard break, it is the standard migration pattern for Java 21.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with Spring Boot 3.3+ @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
